title: Aruba Helps Network Teams Overcome Scarce Staff Resources with First AIOps Solution that Combines Network and Security Insights for Improved IT Efficiency
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New Aruba AIOps capabilities greatly reduce the time spent on manual tasks like network troubleshooting, performance tuning, and security enforcement.

title: French Cloud Service Provider AntemetA Selects HPE GreenLake to Introduce New Automated Disaster Recovery Service
text: PARIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that AntemetA, one of the leading cloud service providers in France, has selected HPE GreenLake for Disaster Recovery, a new cloud-native data solution that protects data from the edge to the cloud, to build a manageable, flexible and highly secure private hosting infrastructure to support strategic workloads and drive new business growth. title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Ezmeral Chosen by Catharina Hospital
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) to enhance accurate diagnosis and quality of patient care for Netherlands' Catharina hospital by offering edge-to-cloud infrastructure and analytical solution - HPE Ezmeral.

title: Catharina Hospital Selects HPE Ezmeral to Power Data-First Modernization and Improve Accuracy and Speed of Diagnosis
text: AMSTERDAM--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Catharina Hospital, the largest hospital in the Netherlands' Eindhoven region, providing care for over 150,000 patients, has selected the HPE Ezmeral software portfolio to build a cloud-native analytics and data lakehouse to provide more accurate diagnosis, early detection and injury prevention for patients.
